# The AI Fraud Frontier: How Fraudsters and Fraud Fighters Have Adopted AI Technology

# The AI Fraud Frontier: How Fraudsters and Fraud Fighters Have Adopted AI Technology

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

This webinar explores the Sift Q2 2024 Digital Trust Index, covering how cybercriminals are leveraging generative AI to launch increasingly sophisticated and scalable fraud attacks, and how companies can combat AI-fueled fraud with advanced, AI-powered technology.

We discuss the differences between fraudsters and fraud fighters in adopting AI technology, the most common uses of traditional and generative AI on both sides, and strategies merchants can use to stay ahead.

Watch the webinar to learn:

*   **Who’s ahead in adopting AI tech:** Gain insights into the latest advancements in AI technology and understand who’s leading the race—fraudsters or fraud fighters.
*   **Common uses of AI:** Discover the most common applications of traditional and generative AI by both fraudsters and fraud fighters.
*   **Strategies for staying ahead:** Learn effective strategies to ensure your business remains one step ahead of fraudsters, leveraging the latest AI technologies.

### Watch the On-Demand Webinar

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
